display.description: This activity lists files in an OpenAI vector store with support for filtering and pagination

display.name: API Endpoint URL
display.description: Endpoint URL for the OpenAI API, for example https://api.openai.com/v1

display.name: OpenAI API Key
display.description: OpenAI API key that is required to authenticate with the OpenAI API

outputs.name: files
outputs.value: {"$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#", "title": "OpenAI Vector Store Files", "description": "Array of vector store file objects returned by the OpenAI list files API", "type": "array", "items": {"type": "object", "required": ["id", "created_at", "last_error", "object", "status", "usage_bytes", "vector_store_id", "attributes", "chunking_strategy"], "additionalProperties": false, "properties": {"id": {"type": "string", "description": "Unique identifier for the file", "pattern": "^file-[a-zA-Z0-9]+$"}, "created_at": {"type": "integer", "description": "Unix timestamp when the file was created", "minimum": 0}, "last_error": {"type": "object", "description": "Information about the last error encountered (empty strings when no error)", "required": ["code", "message"], "additionalProperties": false, "properties": {"code": {"type": "string", "description": "Error code, empty string when no error"}, "message": {"type": "string", "description": "Error message, empty string when no error"}}}, "object": {"type": "string", "description": "Object type identifier", "enum": ["vector_store.file"]}, "status": {"type": "string", "description": "Processing status of the file", "enum": ["in_progress", "completed", "failed", "cancelled"]}, "usage_bytes": {"type": "integer", "description": "Number of bytes used by the file", "minimum": 0}, "vector_store_id": {"type": "string", "description": "ID of the vector store containing this file", "pattern": "^vs_[a-zA-Z0-9]+$"}, "attributes": {"type": "object", "description": "Custom attributes associated with the file (free-form key/value pairs)", "additionalProperties": {"type": ["string", "number", "boolean", "null"]}}, "chunking_strategy": {"type": "object", "description": "Strategy used for chunking the file", "required": ["type"], "additionalProperties": false, "properties": {"type": {"type": "string", "description": "Type of chunking strategy", "enum": ["static", "auto"]}, "static": {"type": "object", "description": "Static chunking configuration (present when type is static)", "required": ["chunk_overlap_tokens", "max_chunk_size_tokens"], "additionalProperties": false, "properties": {"chunk_overlap_tokens": {"type": "integer", "description": "Number of tokens to overlap between chunks", "minimum": 0}, "max_chunk_size_tokens": {"type": "integer", "description": "Maximum size of each chunk in tokens", "minimum": 0}}}}}}}}
